messages.content: What is your desired role, seniority level, and primary skills?
Hiring a mid-level Java developer who also needs to work well with stakeholders, entry level to mid, under 30 minutes total
Here are some assessments that fit: Core Java (Entry Level) (New), Core Java (Advanced Level) (New), and Java 8 (New).
Actually, also add a personality assessment for the stakeholder management part
